key.name: bar-orientation
key.description: Orientation for the battery bar: 'portrait' or 'landscape'.

key.name: indicator-position
key.description: Where to place the panel indicator: 'left', 'right', or 'default'.

key.name: batterysize
key.description: Pixel width for the battery icon.

key.name: batteryheight
key.description: Pixel height for the battery icon.

key.name: showpercentageoutside
key.description: When enabled, shows percentage as text outside the icon.

key.name: showdecimals
key.description: If enabled, displays wattage like 15.75W. If disabled, displays 16W.

key.name: showcolored
key.description: Enable the charge-level gradient for the battery icon. Disable to force monochrome themed rendering.

key.name: showcoloredtext
key.description: Enable the charge-level gradient for panel text. Disable to force monochrome themed rendering.

key.name: charging-icon-color-source
key.description: Controls which color mode is used for the icon while charging.

key.name: icon-custom-color
key.description: Custom hex color used for the icon while charging when the custom charging color option is selected.

key.name: text-color-source
key.description: Controls which color mode is used for text while charging.

key.name: text-custom-color
key.description: Custom hex color used for text while charging when the custom charging color option is selected.

key.name: textstroke
key.description: Draw a dark outline around text for better visibility against similar backgrounds.

key.name: use-stock-icon
key.description: Use the native GNOME battery icon instead of the custom drawn bar or circular indicator.

key.name: usecircleindicator
key.description: Replaces the default battery icon with a circular meter indicator.

key.name: circlesize
key.description: Pixel size for the circular indicator.

key.name: forcebolt
key.description: Always show the charging bolt for testing.

key.name: fakecharging
key.description: Force charging state and animate a synthetic percentage for testing visual behavior.

key.name: fakedischarging
key.description: Force discharging state and animate a synthetic percentage for testing visual behavior.

key.name: fakechargemin
key.description: Lower bound for the synthetic charging percentage in debug mode.

key.name: fakechargemax
key.description: Upper bound for the synthetic charging percentage in debug mode.

key.name: loglevel
key.description: Verbosity for debug logging: 0=Verbose, 1=Debug, 2=Info, 3=Warn, 4=Error.

key.name: logtofile
key.description: When enabled, debug logs are written to a file.

key.name: logfilepath
key.description: Path to write debug logs. Leave empty for default cache path.
